message:
feat(tui): add category taxonomy to screen metadata with chrome color coding (br-1xt0m.1.1.2)

Add ScreenCategory methods (label, short_label, ALL) and use category-
specific colors for tab key numbers in the chrome tab bar. Each category
gets a distinct color: Overview=accent, Communication=message-blue,
Operations=warn-amber, System=ok-green. This provides visual wayfinding
without changing the tab layout or reducing readability.

Adds 2 guard tests: every_category_has_at_least_one_screen and
category_labels_are_non_empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
